narrative:
Dublin Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 721 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points.
